data.name: Small Modular Reactor (SMR) Integration
data.description: SMRs providing baseload power that complements variable renewables. SMRs can load-follow and provide process heat for industrial applications.
data.integration: SMR + solar/wind + storage; district heating; hydrogen production
data.status: GE Hitachi BWRX-300 under construction in Canada; Rolls-Royce SMR in UK

data.name: Nuclear Hydrogen Production
data.description: Using nuclear heat and electricity for high-temperature electrolysis or thermochemical hydrogen production. More efficient than using variable renewables alone.
data.integration: HTGR/SMR + SOEC electrolysis; thermochemical cycles (S-I, Cu-Cl)
data.status: DOE hydrogen hubs; pilot projects at Idaho National Lab; Japan HTTR
